summary: Completed frontend testing of UI/UX restructuring. All features verified: 1) Retirement Confidence page with Quick/Advanced toggle, 2) Today/After Changes/After Stress display, 3) Family Wealth Dashboard with Retirement Overview card showing confidence score, success rate, years to retirement, projected balance, 4) Client Portal welcome banner with Retirement Confidence, 5) Navigation shows 'Retirement Planner' and 'Retirement Confidence' under Calculators, 6) Backend /api/hybrid-engine/calculate endpoint working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX restructuring complete. Key pages: /retirement-confidence (combined Confidence Engine + Hybrid Engine with Quick/Advanced toggle), /family-wealth (Net Worth with Retirement Overview card), /client-portal (Client view with Retirement Confidence in welcome banner). Navigation updated: Calculators section has 'Retirement Planner' (NEW badge) and 'Retirement Confidence' (PRO badge). Separate Accumulation/Decumulation links removed - unified under Retirement Planner.

retirement_confidence_page.quick_advanced_toggle: PASS - Quick/Advanced toggle buttons visible and functional
retirement_confidence_page.today_after_changes_after_stress: PASS - Shows Today (84%), After Changes (84%), After Stress (100%)
retirement_confidence_page.tabs: PASS - 5 tabs: Overview, Inputs, Factors, Scenarios, AI Assist
retirement_confidence_page.stress_test_results: PASS - Base Case, Market Crash (-30%), High Inflation (6%), Live 5 Years Longer displayed
retirement_confidence_page.mode_toggle: PASS - Advisor/Live mode toggle visible (Advanced mode only)

family_wealth_dashboard.retirement_overview_card: PASS - Card visible with gradient background
family_wealth_dashboard.confidence_score: PASS - Shows 84% with On Track badge
family_wealth_dashboard.monte_carlo_success: PASS - Shows 100.0% with 'Probability of not running out'

navigation_structure.calculators_section: PASS - CALCULATORS section visible in sidebar

backend_api.hybrid_engine_calculate: PASS - Returns confidence_score, display (today/after_stress), monte_carlo, stress_tests, explanation

mocked_apis_list: Market data indicators use default 2024-25 economic values
mocked_apis.note: Economic indicators (expected_return=7%, inflation=2.5%, volatility=15%) are configurable defaults, not live market feeds.
